summary: All new features tested successfully: Commission split field on payment records, Consignor Portal View modal from admin dashboard, and Admin dashboard navigation with Password Management moved under Team Management. 31 total tests passed (22 frontend E2E + 9 backend API).
seed_data_creation: Created test payment records with commission split - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly: 1) Commission split field appears in consignment payments tab with 50/50 placeholder, can be modified to any value like 60/40, and persists to database. 2) Consignor Portal View modal opens from Portal button in Agreements table, shows admin preview indicator, My Account section with personal info/consignment details/account summary, and password protection status. 3) Admin dashboard has 4 groups: Team Management (includes Password Management), Payroll & Payments, Forms & Communications, Operations & Reports.

commission_split_field.location: Payroll & Payments > Payment Records > Consignment tab
tests: Commission split input field visible with placeholder 50/50
Field is editable - can change to 60/40, 70/30 etc
Backend updates commission_split on existing record
Backend retrieves commission_split from stored records

consignor_portal_view_modal.location: Forms & Communications > Form Submissions > Agreements tab > Portal button
tests: Portal button visible in each agreement row
Modal shows 'Admin View - Consignor Portal Preview' indicator
My Account section shows Personal Information
Consignment Details shows split percentage, payment method, agreement date
Account Summary shows total submissions, total paid, payments received, pending items
Four main groups visible: Team Management, Payroll & Payments, Forms & Communications, Operations & Reports
Team Management expands to show All Employees, Hours by Employee, Password Management
Password Management has Employees and Consignors tabs
Payroll & Payments shows Payroll Summary and Payment Records
Forms & Communications shows Messages and Form Submissions
